---
name: New platform request
about: Request support for a platform not currently covered
labels: new-platform
---

## Platform name

<!-- e.g. Mastodon, Bluesky, Instagram, Twitch -->

## What data would be converted?

<!-- e.g. "the accounts I follow" / "my channel subscriptions" / "the podcasts I follow" -->

## Does the platform have a data export?

<!-- Yes / No / Not sure. If yes, describe how to get it (Settings → Privacy → Download Data, etc.) -->

## Does the platform have RSS feeds?

<!-- Yes (link to docs if known) / No / Not sure. RSS feeds are what make the conversion useful — without them, eta can only list the accounts, not subscribe to their updates. -->

## Why is this platform worth adding?

<!-- Who uses it? Why would escaping its algorithm be valuable? -->

## Are you willing to help build it?

<!-- Yes / Maybe / No — no pressure either way, but it helps maintainers prioritize. -->
